yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_May_2026_Patch_Tuesday_30_Critical_Vulne {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for May 2026 Patch Tuesday: 30 Critical Vulnerabilities Among 130 CVEs"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-22"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Ubiquiti_Patches_Critical_UniFi_OS_Vulne {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Ubiquiti Patches Critical UniFi OS Vulnerabilities Allowing Remote Privilege Esc"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-22"
    strings:

        $kw0 = "UniFi" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-9255 - Tool Execution Without Authorization via Pip"; content:"CVE-2026-9255"; nocase; sid:8892104; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
